configurations.name: uniliv-web
runtimeArgs: set -a; . ./.env; set +a; export BASE_PATH=/ API_PROXY_TARGET=http://localhost:8090; exec pnpm --filter @workspace/uniliv-admin run dev

configurations.name: uniliv-web-audit
runtimeArgs: set -a; . ./.env; set +a; export BASE_PATH=/ API_PROXY_TARGET=http://localhost:8095; exec pnpm --filter @workspace/uniliv-admin run dev
